name: Gingerbread Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the molasses, butter and egg yolks in a bowl and whisk with a fork until smooth.
2. Blend in the buttermilk.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg and salt into another mixing bowl.
4. Stir in the crystalized ginger.
5. Make a well in the center of the dry mixture and pour in the molasses mixture, beating quickly until smooth.
6. Fold in the beaten egg whites.
7. If the batter seems too thick, add a little more buttermilk.
8. Cook the batter in your waffle iron until it reaches a dark golden brown color.
9. Makes 4 large, thick waffles.
